title: UserUnauthorizedException misspelled in error_code in API response
excerpt:
In the error code docs, the UserUnauthorizedException is misspelled as UserUnauthroizedException. This misspelling is also present in the error_code when the API returns an error corresponding to that exception. 
It look…

posts.author: riosd (Danny)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the error code docs, the UserUnauthorizedException is misspelled as UserUnauthroizedException. This misspelling is also present in the error_code when the API returns an error corresponding to that exception.

It looks like it’s been that way for a good bit judging by past posts that mention the error with the misspelling (dating back to October 2020). Is this intended to remain in the event that it breaks others’ flow(s)?

Not that I can’t just check for either spelling on my end.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @riosd and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

Thank yo very much for bringing this into our attention!

It will be taken care of.

Cheers,
Matias
